actions_resetProgressConfirm.message: This will clear all tutorial completion status. You'll see first-visit prompts again.

empty_noTutorials.message: No tutorials available for this page.

empty_noTutorialsDescription.message: Tutorials will appear here when you navigate to pages that have guided tours.

prompt_description.message: Take a quick tour to learn the key features.

playground_basics_description.message: Learn how to select models and send your first message

playground_basics_modelContent.message: Select an AI model to chat with. Different models have different capabilities - look for tags like 'Vision' or 'Fast'. Star your favorites for quick access.

playground_basics_inputContent.message: Type your message here and press Enter to send. You can ask questions, request help with tasks, or have a conversation.

playground_basics_slashContent.message: Type / to see available commands. Try /search to find content in your knowledge base, or /web to search the internet.

playground_basics_promptContent.message: Select a system prompt to guide how the AI responds. You can create custom prompts in the Prompts workspace.

playground_basics_newChatContent.message: Click here to start a new conversation. Your previous chats are saved in the sidebar for easy access.

playground_tools_description.message: Discover knowledge search, file uploads, and advanced tools

playground_tools_toolsButtonContent.message: Access knowledge search, upload files, configure MCP tools, and more advanced features here.

playground_tools_knowledgeContent.message: Enable knowledge search to let the AI reference your ingested documents, notes, and media. Great for research and fact-checking.

playground_tools_webSearchContent.message: Toggle web search to let the AI search the internet for current information. Perfect for recent news or topics not in your knowledge base.

playground_tools_uploadContent.message: Upload images or documents to discuss them with the AI. Vision-capable models can analyze images directly.

playground_tools_ingestContent.message: Use Quick Ingest to add web pages, PDFs, or other content to your knowledge base for later reference.

playground_tools_mcpContent.message: MCP (Model Context Protocol) tools let the AI interact with external services and execute actions on your behalf.

playground_voice_description.message: Learn to use voice input and have spoken conversations

playground_voice_voiceChatContent.message: Start a hands-free voice conversation. Speak naturally and hear AI responses aloud.

playground_voice_dictationContent.message: Use dictation to speak your messages instead of typing. Great for longer inputs or when your hands are busy.

playground_voice_ttsContent.message: Click on any AI response to have it read aloud. Customize the voice and speed in Settings.

playground_voice_settingsContent.message: Configure voice chat settings including the voice model, auto-send timing, and trigger phrases.

workspacePlayground_basics_description.message: Learn the three-pane workspace flow: sources, chat, and studio outputs

workspacePlayground_basics_headerContent.message: Use the header to rename, switch, import, and manage workspaces while tracking system status.

workspacePlayground_basics_sourcesConten.message: Add and select sources here. Your selected source set controls what the chat and studio use.

workspacePlayground_basics_chatContent.message: Ask questions against your selected sources and review grounded answers before generating outputs.

workspacePlayground_basics_studioContent.message: Turn source context into summaries, reports, quizzes, flashcards, and other artifacts.

workspacePlayground_basics_switcherConte.message: Open the workspace switcher to jump between saved workspaces and continue different projects.

media_basics_description.message: Search, filter, inspect, and manage ingested media in the library

media_basics_searchContent.message: Start with a query here to find items by title or content.

media_basics_filtersContent.message: Refine by media types, metadata, keywords, and collection filters before running searches.

media_basics_submitContent.message: Submit your query after adjusting filters to refresh the result set.

media_basics_resultsContent.message: Review matched items, select one, and navigate pages to inspect more content.

media_basics_viewerContent.message: Inspect selected content, metadata, and navigation details in the main viewer pane.

media_basics_toolsContent.message: Open library tools for ingest job monitoring and storage/usage statistics.

knowledge_basics_description.message: Search your indexed sources and review grounded answers with citations

knowledge_basics_searchContent.message: Enter a focused question about your docs, notes, or media to start retrieval.

knowledge_basics_sourcesContent.message: Select which source groups to query so answers stay scoped to what you care about.

knowledge_basics_contextContent.message: Adjust retrieval preset and context options before running your search.

knowledge_basics_historyContent.message: Reuse prior threads and queries from history so you can continue investigations quickly.

knowledge_basics_resultsContent.message: Review answer output, cited sources, and evidence once a search completes.

characters_basics_description.message: Create, filter, and manage reusable character assistants for chat workflows

characters_basics_newContent.message: Start here to create a new character with persona, prompt, greeting, and metadata.

characters_basics_searchContent.message: Filter your character library by name, description, tags, or prompt content.

characters_basics_scopeContent.message: Switch between active and deleted characters to recover or permanently remove entries.

characters_basics_viewContent.message: Toggle between table and gallery layouts based on whether you need dense controls or visual browsing.

characters_basics_libraryContent.message: Open character actions to chat, quick-chat, edit, duplicate, export, or review version history.
